summary: Iteration 16: Bulk Attendance Feature - Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed), Frontend 100% verified. All attendance endpoints working correctly with proper RBAC enforcement.
critical_code_review_comments: Attendance page correctly displays all 8 students for Math teacher with Present/Absent/Late/Excused buttons
Status buttons visually highlight when selected with appropriate colors (green=present, red=absent, amber=late, blue=excused)
Mark All buttons correctly change all students to the selected status at once
Save Attendance button submits bulk attendance and shows success state (button turns green with 'Saved!')
Date navigation (prev/next arrows) loads attendance for different dates correctly
Summary stats (Present/Absent/Late/Excused counts) update correctly when changing student statuses
Upsert behavior works correctly - updating existing records instead of creating duplicates
Teacher navigation includes Attendance link between Grade Book and My Students
Non-teacher users (coach, player) correctly get 403 from backend API
Coach navigation does NOT include Attendance link (correct RBAC)
Attendance page shows 'No students found' for non-teachers who navigate directly to /Attendance

backend_endpoints.GET /api/teachers/attendance: ✓ Returns students and attendance records for specified date
backend_endpoints.POST /api/teachers/attendance/bulk: ✓ Creates/updates attendance records with upsert behavior

frontend_features.attendance_page: ✓ Renders all 8 students with status buttons
frontend_features.mark_all_buttons: ✓ Mark All buttons change all students to selected status
frontend_features.save_button: ✓ Save Attendance button submits bulk attendance
frontend_features.date_navigation: ✓ Prev/Next arrows and date picker work correctly
frontend_features.teacher_navigation: ✓ Attendance link appears in teacher sidebar

rbac.coach_denied: ✓ Coach gets 403 when accessing attendance API
rbac.player_denied: ✓ Player gets 403 when accessing attendance API
rbac.frontend_rbac: ✓ Coach navigation does not include Attendance link

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users and students from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16: Bulk Attendance feature complete. Teachers can view all their students on the Attendance page, mark each as Present/Absent/Late/Excused, use Mark All buttons for quick bulk marking, and save all attendance at once. Backend endpoints at /api/teachers/attendance and /api/teachers/attendance/bulk are protected by teacher role check. The bulk endpoint uses upsert behavior - if a record for student+date already exists, it updates instead of creating duplicate. Math teacher (s.mitchell) sees 8 students. Non-teachers get 403 from API. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
